title: MCP Server-Orchestrator
description: The core ecosystem for orchestrating servers using the Model Context Protocol (MCP). Built to standardize interaction between AI agents and various data sources.

title: SMA (Social Media Analytics)
description: AI-powered social media scraping and sentiment analysis system built with Next.js. Processes real-time data to derive actionable insights.

title: Bienal Chaco
description: Artist and user management platform with public voting. Integrated Playwright with MCP for automated testing guidance, ensuring stability during high-traffic events.

title: Clinicom (Clinician UI)
description: Led the migration from Lovable Cloud Sync to a custom environment. Built the core App Shell and CI/CD pipeline on Azure for healthcare-grade security and reliability.

title: Project Tracking System
description: Lead developer for a Next.js management system. Implemented robust CI/CD with GitHub and Donweb, streamlining the internal development lifecycle.
